input.prompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

input.initialPrompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

data.content:
Here's a MAUI `CollectionView` with single selection and pull-to-refresh:

**XAML:**
```xml
<RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
             IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}">
    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
                    SelectionChangedCommand="{Binding SelectionChangedCommand}">
        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:Item">
                <VerticalStackLayout Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontSize="16" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Description}" FontSize="12" TextColor="Gray" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    </CollectionView>
</RefreshView>
```

**ViewModel bindings needed:**

| Property/Command | Type | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `Items` | `ObservableCollection<Item>` | Data source |
| `SelectedItem` | `Item?` | Tracks selection (clear after nav) |
| `IsRefreshing` | `bool` | Controls refresh spinner |
| `RefreshCommand` | `IAsyncRelayCommand` | Triggers API reload |
| `SelectionChangedCommand` | `IAsyncRelayCommand` | Navigates to detail |

**ViewModel sketch (CommunityToolkit.Mvvm):**
```csharp
[ObservableProperty]
private Item? _selectedItem;

[ObservableProperty]
private bool _isRefreshing;

public ObservableCollection<Item> Items { get; } = new();

[RelayCommand]
private async Task RefreshAsync()
{
    var data = await _apiService.GetItemsAsync();
    Items.Clear();
    foreach (var item in data) Items.Add(item);
    IsRefreshing = false; // stops the spinner
}

[RelayCommand]
private async Task SelectionChangedAsync()
{
    if (SelectedItem is null) return;
    await Shell.Current.GoToAsync($"detail?id={SelectedItem.Id}");
    SelectedItem = null; // reset so user can re-select same item
}
```

**Key points:**
- Wrap `CollectionView` in `RefreshView` — the pull gesture binds to `RefreshCommand`.
- Set `IsRefreshing = false` when done to dismiss the spinner.
- Null out `SelectedItem` after navigation so the same row can be tapped again.
- `SelectionMode="Single"` prevents multi-select; use `"Multiple"` + `SelectedItems` if needed later.
